picks.title: SoFA Street Fair – Spring Edition
picks.why: SoFA Street Fair brings live bands, drag racing, and hundreds of vendors to Downtown San Jose's creative heart.

picks.title: Soul Street Block Party
picks.why: Soul Street Block Party features live music, line dancing, wing contests, and a D9 stroll-off celebration.

picks.title: Spring into Green 2026
picks.why: Spring into Green's 10-year anniversary celebrates sustainability with 20+ interactive booths and live entertainment.

picks.title: La Traviata
picks.why: Opera San José concludes its season with Verdi's passionate La Traviata—a rare chance for world-class opera.

picks.title: Free Admission on Nikkei Matsuri!
picks.venue: Japanese American Museum of San Jose
picks.why: Free admission to the Japanese American Museum during Nikkei Matsuri—a vibrant cultural celebration you won't find elsewhere.
